title: Pan-Seared Knuckle with Garlic and Vegetables
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared knuckle served with a medley of sautéed vegetables and garlic.

ingredients.name: Medley
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots, and onions

instructions: 1. Season the knuckle with salt and pepper.
2. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, then add 1 tablespoon of oil.
3. Sear the knuckle for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
4. Reduce heat to medium and continue cooking for 10-12 minutes, or until the knuckle reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
5. In a separate skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
6. Add the medley and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
7. Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
8. Serve the knuckle with the garlic and vegetable medley.
